section_header: effect on gas rates and bills

individual.policy_statement: SoCalGas proposes increasing gas rates starting in 2009 to recover the program costs associated with its proposed Climate Action Initiative (Application A.07-08-031), subject to CPUC approval.
individual.verbatim_text: SoCalGas proposes that 2009 be the first year that rates are increased to recover program costs proposed in this application. ... If the Commission approves this request, a residential customer's average monthly bill of 46 therms per month of gas usage would increase by 9 cents per month, from $52.22 to $52.31.
individual.section_header: EFFECT ON GAS RATES AND BILLS
individual.extraction_rationale: This is an explicit proposed intervention with a defined timing (first year 2009) and mechanism (rate increase) to fund program costs, contingent on regulatory approval; it is more than background context.
